description_long: This is a round cake with a pink icing layer covering the sides and top, adorned with a generous arrangement of halved strawberries on the upper surface. The sides of the cake are coated with a crumbly, golden-brown nut or biscuit layer, giving it a textured appearance. The strawberries are glossy, likely glazed, and are arranged concentrically, creating a visually appealing pattern. The cake sits on a simple, flat, light gray plate that contrasts with the vibrant colors of the cake. The overall look is inviting and festive, suitable for celebrations or as a display in a bakery window. The cake appears to be a single-tier dessert with a rustic yet appetizing decoration style.
description: A round, single-tier cake with pink icing, glazed strawberries on top, and crumbly nut or biscuit sides, displayed on a flat gray plate.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full strawberry topping and the crumb-coated sides, with the pink icing visible beneath the strawberries.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the thickness of the crumb layer and the glossy strawberries, with the pink icing peeking through.
description_view_2: The cake's round shape and even distribution of strawberries are clear, with the crumbly sides and plate visible.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the rustic texture of the sides and the uniform strawberry arrangement on top.
